mapper.select: SELECT * FROM word_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND word_id = #{wordId}

SELECT wp.*, w.word, w.phonetic, w.meaning FROM word_progress wp JOIN word w ON wp.word_id = w.id WHERE wp.user_id = #{userId} AND wp.book_id = #{bookId} AND wp.wrong_count > 0 AND wp.status != 'MASTERED' ORDER BY wp.wrong_count DESC, wp.update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM word_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO word_progress (user_id, word_id, book_id, correct_count, wrong_count, status, last_review_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{wordId}, #{bookId}, #{correctCount}, #{wrongCount}, #{status}, #{lastReviewTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE word_progress SET correct_count = correct_count + 1, last_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW(), status = CASE WHEN correct_count + 1 >= 3 THEN 'MASTERED' ELSE 'LEARNING' END WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND word_id = #{wordId}
UPDATE word_progress SET wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, correct_count = 0, last_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW(), status = 'LEARNING' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND word_id = #{wordId}
UPDATE word_progress SET status = 'MASTERED', last_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND word_id = #{wordId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM word_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND word_id = #{wordId}
mapper.update: UPDATE word_progress SET status = 'MASTERED', last_review_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND wrong_count > 0 AND status != 'MASTERED'
